title: Retroactive Induction
desc: You want prior training, tuition, or supplies recognized retroactively under Chapter 31 and may need GI Bill month restoration.

fields.name: priorProgram
fields.label: Prior program or degree
fields.placeholder: e.g. B.S. in Nursing started under Chapter 33

fields.name: priorTermWindow
fields.label: Prior term dates or training window

fields.name: currentGoalAlignment
fields.label: How the prior training aligns with the current rehabilitation goal
fields.placeholder: e.g. Same occupational path later approved under Chapter 31

errors: Retroactive induction requests fail when the record does not clearly tie prior training to a later-approved rehabilitation goal.
Veterans often need a packet that explains why the prior education should have been treated as part of the Chapter 31 rehabilitation path.

evidenceChecklist.text: Past tuition invoices, receipts, or supply records
Transcripts or enrollment records from the prior terms
Rating decision or proof of service-connected status during the prior period
Explanation showing the past training aligns with the approved goal
